race.comment: YES I KNOW (6) just on top. He's a consistent operator who ran on well first up at Seymour as a $3 chance, beaten two lengths into third over 1200m which was always going to be on the sharp side. Up to 1400m now on the bigger track looks ideal and he draws perfectly for Mott. BRONTE BEACH (10) resumes. She didn't fire in three runs last time in but took on a couple of good races and has won a trial leading in. She showed good ability early doors and can run well here. LEGIO TEN (1) beat a subsequent winner when last seen over this route in a good driving finish. Up in the weights again but draws low and can win again. NEW SOVEREIGN (4) was behind LEGIO TEN last time but was only second up and can peak now. SEETHRU (5) won well fresh in easier grade and is in the mix.
